_comment: Species: Blood Beast (血兽) from Pursuit of the Truth. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Blood Beast

canonical.appearance: Formless blood-mass 5 m, can shape into any beast, perpetually dripping
canonical.size: 5 m mass, 8000 jin; ancient spans battlefields
canonical.behavior: Born of battlefield blood; cultivates by consuming bloodlines; mutates prey
canonical.relationships: Lesser kin of Blood Ancestor Beast
canonical.bloodline: Blood-Beast lineage; dilute Blood Ancestor bloodline
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: blood_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
